title: KTF Heroes & Horizons
description: This modpack combines RPG classes, progression, and exploration with a living economy, unique structures, and immersive villages. Featuring Cobblemon, farming & nature expansions, and Create automation, it offers endless adventures in a dynamic world.
body:
# 🌍 KTF Heroes & Horizons  

**KTF Heroes & Horizons** is a fantasy-RPG Minecraft modpack built around **class progression, exploration, and immersive worldbuilding**. Whether you’re chasing treasure, battling monsters, training Cobblemon, or mastering advanced engineering, this pack creates a dynamic sandbox for every adventurer.  

---

## ✨ Key Features  

### 🗡️ RPG Classes & Progression  
- **Level Z & Expansions** – Unlock skills and level up with specialized classes like Wizards, Archers, Paladins, Rogues, and more.  
- **Artifacts & Radiant Gear** – Discover unique loot, accessories, and RPG-style enhancements.  
- **Origins** – Choose from distinct player origins, each with unique abilities and drawbacks.  

### 🐾 Cobblemon & Creatures  
- **Cobblemon** and its addons bring Pokémon-inspired creatures into Minecraft.  
- Catch, battle, and train your team, explore gyms, and fill your Cobblepedia.  
- Side-mods expand trainers, Pokécenters, and Cobblemon-related quests.  

### 🌾 Animals, Farming & Nature  
- **Farmer’s Delight** expands cooking and farming with new meals and crops.  
- **Respawning Animals & Feeding Troughs** keep your farms alive and thriving.  
- **Horse Overhaul Mods** add depth with traits, equipment, and summoning tools.  
- **Serene Seasons** (visuals only) makes the world feel alive without restricting crop growth.  
- **Nature mods** like Geophilic, Tectonic, and Snow Under Trees bring richer landscapes.  

### 🏘 Villagers & Economy  
- **Numismatic Overhaul** replaces emerald trading with a coin-based economy.  
- Villagers get more personality with **names, voices, random village names, and respawns**.  
- **Bounties, trading posts, and bartering stations** deepen the player–villager economy.  

### 🏰 Exploration & Adventure  
- **Dungeons & Taverns overhauls** major vanilla structures.  
- **Structurized Reborn** and **Camps, Castles & Carriages** add new places to discover.  
- **AdventureZ** introduces new bosses and challenges.  
- **End Remastered** expands the journey to the End.  

### ⚙️ Create & Technology  
- **Create** and its addons power massive machines and contraptions.  
- **Immersive Aircraft & Gliders** open new skies for explorers.  
- **Tom’s Simple Storage & Addons** streamline inventory management.  

### 🎨 Player Cosmetics & Immersion  
- Customize your look with **Cosmetic Armor, Transmog, hats, titles, and emotes**.  
- Roleplay your character with immersive overlays and unique cosmetics.  

### 🗺️ Utilities & QoL  
- Minimap, atlas, and compass tools for easier exploration.  
- Smart inventory mods, auto tool selection, and gravestones.  
- Combat & enchantment upgrades to fine-tune your playstyle.  

---

## 🎮 Why Play *KTF Heroes & Horizons*?  
This pack blends **RPG progression, Cobblemon adventures, and fantasy exploration** with deep farming, living villages, and advanced tech. Build your legacy as a hero, trainer, farmer, or engineer — in a world full of **quests, monsters, and endless creativity**.
